activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the past continuous form.
activities.prompt: At eight o'clock, we were wait outside the theatre.

evaluator.answer: At eight o'clock, we were waiting outside the theatre

activities.explanation: Después de «were» necesitamos la forma «waiting».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the completed event.
activities.prompt: The meeting was end at 4.15 and everyone left.

evaluator.answer: The meeting ended at 4.15 and everyone left

activities.explanation: El evento completo usa past simple «ended».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the action in progress.
activities.prompt: I was walk home when it started to rain.

evaluator.answer: I was walking home when it started to rain

activities.explanation: La acción en progreso necesita «was walking».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the parallel action.
activities.prompt: While I was cooking, Leo was set the table.

evaluator.answer: While I was cooking, Leo was setting the table

activities.explanation: Después de «was» usamos «setting».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the stative verb.
activities.prompt: I was knowing the answer, but I stayed quiet.

evaluator.answer: I knew the answer, but I stayed quiet

activities.explanation: «Know» expresa un estado y usa past simple «knew».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the negative continuous form.
activities.prompt: We weren't expect any visitors, so the knock surprised us.

evaluator.answer: We weren't expecting any visitors, so the knock surprised us

activities.explanation: La negativa continua requiere «weren't expecting».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting its auxiliary.
activities.prompt: Did Maya sleeping when the alarm went off?

evaluator.answer: Was Maya sleeping when the alarm went off

activities.explanation: La pregunta continua usa «Was Maya sleeping?», sin «did».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the interrupted event.
activities.prompt: The lights were went out while we were having dinner.

evaluator.answer: The lights went out while we were having dinner

activities.explanation: El apagón completo usa past simple «went out».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting subject–auxiliary agreement.
activities.prompt: The children was running when the whistle blew.

evaluator.answer: The children were running when the whistle blew

activities.explanation: El sujeto plural «children» requiere «were running».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «did».
activities.prompt: I did saved the file before I closed the laptop.

evaluator.answer: I saved the file before I closed the laptop

activities.explanation: La afirmativa normal usa directamente el pasado «saved».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the temporary background form.
activities.prompt: I met Jo while I was work in Madrid for the summer.

evaluator.answer: I met Jo while I was working in Madrid for the summer

activities.explanation: La actividad de fondo requiere «was working».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the past simple form.
activities.prompt: I did lived near the coast from 2018 to 2020.

evaluator.answer: I lived near the coast from 2018 to 2020

activities.explanation: El periodo completo usa la afirmativa «lived», sin «did».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the past simple form.
activities.prompt: After reading it carefully, I did thought the plan was too risky.

evaluator.answer: After reading it carefully, I thought the plan was too risky

activities.explanation: «Think» como opinión se expresa aquí con «thought».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the ongoing thought process.
activities.prompt: I was think about changing the route when you called.

evaluator.answer: I was thinking about changing the route when you called

activities.explanation: El proceso en curso usa «was thinking».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting agreement in the background.
activities.prompt: Rain were falling and people were hurrying home.

evaluator.answer: Rain was falling and people were hurrying home

activities.explanation: El sujeto incontable singular «rain» requiere «was falling».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the deliberate action in progress.
activities.prompt: The chef was taste the sauce when the alarm sounded.

evaluator.answer: The chef was tasting the sauce when the alarm sounded

activities.explanation: La acción deliberada en progreso usa «was tasting».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb that describes a property.
activities.prompt: The sauce was tasting unusually bitter, so we did not serve it.

evaluator.answer: The sauce tasted unusually bitter, so we did not serve it

activities.explanation: Como propiedad, «taste» usa past simple «tasted».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the completed long period.
activities.prompt: She did worked in Nairobi for five years before moving to Accra.

evaluator.answer: She worked in Nairobi for five years before moving to Accra

activities.explanation: La afirmativa en past simple usa directamente «worked».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the ongoing repeated activity.
activities.prompt: The warning light was flash continuously when I switched the machine off.

evaluator.answer: The warning light was flashing continuously when I switched the machine off

activities.explanation: La actividad seguía en progreso y se presenta con «was flashing».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the irritating repeated habit.
activities.prompt: He was always borrowed my charger without asking.

evaluator.answer: He was always borrowing my charger without asking

activities.explanation: Después de «was always» usamos la forma «borrowing».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting agreement in the parallel action.
activities.prompt: While one technician were collecting samples, another was recording the data.

evaluator.answer: While one technician was collecting samples, another was recording the data

activities.explanation: «One technician» es singular y requiere «was collecting».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the completed interruption.
activities.prompt: We were following the route when the GPS did stopped working.

evaluator.answer: We were following the route when the GPS stopped working

activities.explanation: La afirmativa en past simple usa «stopped» sin «did».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the stative verb.
activities.prompt: I was believing the figures were wrong while the analyst was checking them.

evaluator.answer: I believed the figures were wrong while the analyst was checking them

activities.explanation: «Believe» expresa un estado y usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the ongoing test.
activities.prompt: When the inspector arrived, the technicians were run the final safety test.

evaluator.answer: When the inspector arrived, the technicians were running the final safety test

activities.explanation: Después de «were» necesitamos «running».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting both subject–auxiliary agreements.
activities.prompt: The wind were blowing harder as we was crossing the ridge.

evaluator.answer: The wind was blowing harder as we were crossing the ridge

activities.explanation: «Wind» usa «was» y «we» usa «were».
